description: The image captures a cozy corner of a room where a television set rests on a white brick wall. The television screen displays an ongoing video game, with the player's character poised for action in the foreground and a serene blue ocean stretching out into the distance. Flanking the television are two black metal brackets, standing like sentinels on either side. Below the television, a small black grate is embedded in the wall, adding to the room's rustic charm. The image is taken from a slightly elevated angle, offering a comprehensive view of this inviting setup.
